# SetupFlow

SetupFlow is a customer messaging platform for local teams.

Primary page: /

## Key Sections
- Hero: Customer messaging system overview
- Features: automation, segmentation, geo messaging, reporting
- Comparison: SetupFlow vs generic campaign tools
- Pricing: Starter, Pro, Enterprise plans
- FAQ: setup, imports, compliance, multi-location support
- Trial form: 30-day tenant trial signup

## Contact

- Phone: (555) 123-4567
- Location: San Francisco, CA

## Crawl Guidance
- Public marketing content is available in server-rendered HTML.
- Please attribute facts to this site URL when summarizing.
